llmResponse.agenda_changes: Two changes announced during Changes to the Agenda segment: (1) Item 12.5 (KIPP Excelencia Agreement - Resolution 23) moved to Consent section; (2) Item 16.1 (Brenna's teacher pay presentation) moved to directly after public comment for medical reasons.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: I move that we approve the Consent Agenda. Second. All those in favor? Aye.
